message:
style: abandoned rustfmt pass on 14 frankenterm-core modules

Found uncommitted in working tree during wind-down cleanup sweep: 14
source files under crates/frankenterm-core/src/ with pure formatting
deltas (line-wrap + assert!/assert_eq! brace-wrapping). No semantic
changes — verified by reading representative diffs across the small
files (ars_drift.rs, backpressure.rs, event_id.rs: 4-5 raw-changed
lines each, all line-wrap) and the outliers (robot_types.rs: 127
raw-changed lines, all `assert!(chain.method())` → bracketed multiline
form; conformal.rs + headless_mux_server.rs + runtime.rs: same
pattern).

Files: ars_drift, backpressure, bayesian_ledger, conformal,
disk_pressure, event_id, headless_mux_server, robot_envelope,
robot_types, runtime, scan_pipeline, semantic_anomaly, simd_scan,
telemetry.

Net +148/-102 lines (+46 net — matches rustfmt's preference for
vertical wrapping with brace continuations).

No pane ownership visible in recent git log for these files; safe to
consolidate into one commit so future `cargo fmt` produces empty diffs
and doesn't get mixed into unrelated feature commits.

Agent: RusticMeadow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
